data.title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Pours $290,836,000 Into Two Assets, Exits Exposure To Three Major US Banks
data.description:
Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller is boosting his stake in a pair of Magnificent 7 stocks while eliminating exposure to the banking industry. New filings show Duquesne Family Office bolstered its holdings in Alphabet (GOOGL) by 277% to 385,000 shares and its holdings in Amazon (AMZN) by 69% to 737,940 shares.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/02/21/billionaire-stanley-druckenmiller-pours-290836000-into-two-assets-exits-exposure-to-three-major-us-banks/

data.title: Trump’s World Liberty Forum Blends Crypto, Wall Street, and Politics
data.description:
President Donald Trump’s family-owned crypto venture, World Liberty Financial (WLF), hosted its inaugural World Liberty Forum at Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida, bringing together financial executives, regulators, celebrities, and political allies under one roof.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/trumps-world-liberty-forum-blends-crypto-wall-street-and-politics/

data.title: Thailand to Continue Trade Talks with U.S. Following Supreme Court Ruling
data.description: Thailand's Commerce Minister Suphajee Suthumpun announced that the country will proceed with trade negotiations with the United States after a decision by the U.S. Supreme Court. According to Jin10, the ruling is expected to influence the dynamics of international trade discussions between the two nations. The minister emphasized Thailand's commitment to strengthening economic ties and exploring new opportunities for collaboration with the U.S. The decision comes amid ongoing efforts to enhance bilateral trade relations and address mutual interests in various sectors.

data.title: Japan's Yen Hits 53-Year Low in Real Effective Exchange Rate
data.description: Recently, Japan's yen has reached its lowest level in 53 years in terms of real effective exchange rate, reflecting the country's prolonged economic stagnation. According to Jin10, the latest data from the Bank for International Settlements shows that in January, the yen's real effective exchange rate index fell to 67.73, the lowest since Japan adopted a floating exchange rate system in 1973. This index is a crucial measure of a currency's overall purchasing power and international competitiveness. Analysts indicate that the yen's weakening purchasing power highlights the structural issues Japan's economy has faced over the long term. The country's economic growth remains sluggish, and persistently low interest rates continue to exert pressure on the yen's real effective exchange rate.

data.title: AI Developments Poised to Transform Industries, Says Citic Securities
data.description:
On February 21, Citic Securities released a report highlighting the potential impact of advancements in AI technologies on various industries. According to Jin10, the report emphasizes the evolution of native multimodal and world model technologies, which are expected to reshape sectors such as marketing, film, and gaming.

Citic Securities notes that Anthropic's release of Claude Opus 4.6, featuring Agent Teams and adaptive thinking capabilities, has significantly integrated with the Office ecosystem and facilitated complex engineering task management. This development is driving deeper AI penetration in verticals like finance and law.

Meanwhile, OpenAI has launched GPT-5.3-Codex, which not only sets new standards in programming and terminal operations but also demonstrates AI's ability to autonomously develop through environmental control and self-construction.

In the multimodal domain, ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 has begun internal testing, addressing video generation consistency issues through comprehensive multimodal referencing and precise lens control. This initiative is expected to collaborate with Doubao and Seedream to form a complete multimodal matrix, significantly reducing content production costs and accelerating commercialization.

data.title: A wallet suspected of being linked to Infini Hacker exchanged 3003 ETH for 87 WBTC.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a wallet suspected to be associated with Infini Hacker (0x4b61...beb6) exchanged 3,003 ETH for 87 WBTC at a price of $67,700, worth $5.89 million, and then sent it to another wallet.

data.title: Protests Erupt in Kansas Against U.S. Immigration Enforcement
data.description: Hundreds of residents gathered in Lawrence, Kansas, on February 20 to protest recent actions by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). According to Jin10, the demonstrators expressed their opposition to the enforcement activities carried out by immigration officers in the area and criticized the U.S. government's immigration policies. The protest reflects growing discontent among local communities regarding federal immigration enforcement measures.

data.title: IoTeX faces scrutiny amid $4.3M ALEX breach confusion
data.description:
Data from Chainalysis and project posts separate the IoTeX private key hack claims from ALEX Lab’s $4. 3M XLink bridge theft, reducing phishing risks for users.
source: https://coincu.com/news/iotex-faces-scrutiny-amid-4-3m-alex-breach-confusion/

data.title: Dutch Regulator Orders Polymarket to Halt Unlicensed Betting Operations
data.description:
Dutch regulators ordered Polymarket’s affiliate to halt operations for offering unlicensed betting to residents.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/dutch-regulator-orders-polymarket-to-halt-unlicensed-betting-operations/

Users of memecoins issued in the names of US President Donald Trump and his wife Melania Trump have faced significant losses. Continue Reading: Investors Lost $4. 3 Billion on TRUMP and MELANIA Tokens

data.title: Tether Stops CNH₮ Issuance, Sets Redemption Deadline
data.description:
Tether stops issuing CNH₮ and sets a one-year deadline for redemptions, citing low demand and limited usage.
source: https://coincu.com/crypto/tether-stops-cnh%e2%82%ae-issuance/

data.title: IoTeX private key suspected to have been leaked, resulting in a $4.3 million loss of tokens.
data.description: Specter reported on the X platform that IoTeX (@iotex_io)'s private key may have been compromised, leading to the theft of its token vault and a total loss of approximately $4.3 million. The attackers stole various contract assets, including USDC, USDT, IOTX, PAYG, WBTC, and BUSD. The stolen assets have been exchanged for ETH, with 45 ETH bridged to Bitcoin. The attackers' addresses are 0x6487...442f, 1PN2...oyYEc, and 135o...G1Aw.

data.title: Hungarian Prime Minister Orban Intensifies Anti-Ukraine Rhetoric in Re-election Campaign
data.description: Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban is amplifying his anti-Ukraine rhetoric as a central theme in his re-election campaign. Bloomberg posted on X that Orban's campaign is increasingly focusing on criticizing Kyiv's wartime leadership. This strategy marks a significant aspect of his political messaging as he seeks to secure another term in office. The campaign's emphasis on Ukraine highlights Orban's stance on regional geopolitics, which has been a contentious issue in Hungary's political landscape. The Prime Minister's approach reflects his broader political strategy and aligns with his previous positions on international relations.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | India's Opposition Urges Reevaluation of Trade Deal with U.S.
data.description: India's opposition parties have urged Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government to reconsider the nation's trade agreement with the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the opposition's call for amendments to the deal, citing concerns over its impact on domestic industries and economic sovereignty. The opposition argues that the current terms may not be favorable for India and could undermine local businesses. They are advocating for a thorough review and renegotiation to ensure the agreement aligns with India's economic interests. The call for action comes amid ongoing discussions about international trade relations and their implications for national economies.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 630 USDT with a 2.79% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 21, 2026, 09:32 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 630 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 630.080017 USDT, with a narrowed 2.79% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: 10x Research: Circle receives multiple positive boosts; fundamental and institutional factors combined drive stock price higher.
data.description: 10x Research published an article on its X platform stating that Circle (CRCL) stock has bucked the market trend and risen over the past week, closing above its 7-day and 30-day moving averages. At the institutional level, Cathie Wood's ARK Invest increased its holdings of CRCL by 218,000 shares during the market correction, indicating improved institutional confidence. Furthermore, Circle has entered into a strategic partnership with Polymarket, which will use native USDC as its primary settlement asset, further expanding the use of USDC in prediction markets. Analysts believe that the GENIUS Act framework could drive digital dollar reserves to flow more directly into the US Treasury market, and Circle may be a major beneficiary of this trend.

data.title: Research Team Reveals Something Big Is Brewing for XRP
data.description:
Media personality Paul Barron has sparked fresh excitement within the XRP community after hinting that a major development involving Ripple, XRP, and RLUSD could soon come to light. In a recent post on X, Barron revealed that his research team uncovered “something big” brewing for XRP in connection with the Clarity Act. Visit Website
source: https://thecryptobasic.com/2026/02/21/research-team-reveals-something-big-is-brewing-for-xrp/

data.title: DFINITY Foundation: 20% of Cloud Engine revenue will be used to destroy ICPs.
data.description: The DFINITY Foundation, in a statement published on the X platform, stated that the economic model of Internet Computers (ICPs) is changing. Under the old model, node providers were only paid for running nodes; under the new model, 80% of the cloud engine's revenue will be allocated to the nodes that power it, and 20% will be used to burn ICPs. Currently, the Node Provider Association has begun marketing the cloud engine to businesses across Europe.

data.title: DFINITY Foundation Revises Internet Computer Economics to Boost European Enterprise Interest
data.description: The DFINITY Foundation has announced updates to the economic model of the Internet Computer. According to BWEnews, the revised model allocates 80% of cloud engine revenue to node providers, while the remaining 20% is used to burn ICP tokens. This strategic move aims to enhance interest among enterprises in Europe. The Internet Computer's market capitalization currently stands at $1,205 million.
